name: Hobo Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and mustard.
2. Spread the mixture over the cut sides of the rolls.
3. Place the bottom halves of the rolls on a serving plate.
4. Top with bologna, tomato, green pepper, cheese, and top halves of rolls.
5. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until the cheese begins to melt, 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
